TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: myapas owas na mnbuw uwow tlamey mu mowas owas mnbuw uwow: uwow yhe ga iyat kin'iri nbuw ita Tayal ki! iyat kin'iri gaga na Tayal. knahun bwax hekil ro hekil pagey smi uwow yhe. maki gaga smi uwaw na Tayal. gaga nbuw uwow yhe ga siki tluw sn'asan na ryax, ini mhmut mnbuw. s'asey ta ya ryax na soni. howey utux mrhow, kmon ru spunan su khu'. m'es baley ksli' myan, s'asey ta ya ryax na soni "bley ci pungan pn'wasan mu soni.
S.PHON: mjapas~…ē owas~…ē na mnő≤uw uwow tlamej mu mowas~…ē owas~…ē mnő≤uw uwow: uwow jńße …£a ijat kin Ēiri nő≤uw ita tajal ki! ijat kin Ēiri …£a…£a na tajal. knańßun ő≤wax ńßekil ro ńßekil pa…£ej s~…ēmi uwow jńße. maki …£a…£a s~…ēmi uwaw na tajal. …£a…£a nő≤uw uwow jńße …£a s~…ēiki tluw s~…ēn Ēas~…ēan na rjax, ini mńßmut mnő≤uw. s~…ē Ēas~…ēej ta ja rjax na s~…ēoni. ńßowej utux mrńßow, kmon ru s~…ēpunan s~…ēu kńßu Ē. m Ēes~…ē ő≤alej ks~…ēli Ē mjan, s~…ē Ēas~…ēej ta ja rjax na s~…ēoni "ő≤lej ¶~ ®i puŇčan pn Ēwas~…ēan mu s~…ēoni.
